comment: Human-curated perk-domain rulings. A ruled effect never counts as conversion loss AND never rides on gems. Add entries when 'pinned:' lines or rider recipes name something the list grants through perks.

waivedEffects.why: Lockpick durability is a Lockpicking-perk bonus in Requiem/LoreRim, not native to equipment — convert without it, never ride it (marth, 2026-07-10).
waivedEffects.revisit: Deferred: a full perk-domain-vs-equipment-native classification pass over all rider candidates (token-expensive; M34/M35 window).
